title: Luxembourg: become Diplomat for a Day
body: "The Diplomat for a Day competition is a joint initiative by the UK and Canadian  embassies that aims to encourage young women and girls to become leaders and advocates for change. If you win the competition, you will be invited to spend a day with the embassies in Luxembourg, shadowing senior leaders and learning about the work of a diplomat. You will also be able to take part in activities and discussions on the importance of gender equality.  Why you should enter this competition  Women and girls represent half of the world’s population and therefore also half of its potential. Today there are too few women in international diplomacy, including women from under-represented backgrounds, whether ethnic, religious, economic, cultural, or personal identity, among others. Women are not represented at parity in political and business sectors.  To end this underrepresentation, we must ensure equality of opportunity and equitable outcomes for everyone. This is why we, Canada and the United Kingdom are working towards gender equality around the world.  Eligibility  You can enter this competition if, when you apply, you:   are a Luxembourg resident identify as a girl or woman are enrolled in high school in Luxembourg are between the ages of 16 and 19 or turn 16 in 2025 are proficient in English   You must have your parent or legal guardian’s consent to apply. No fees are required to enter this competition.  How to enter  To enter, you must answer the following question:  What positive change would you like to see in your community and in the world regarding women’s rights and equality, and how can you contribute to making that change happen?  Record or write your answer and either:    upload your video on https://www.wetransfer.com.  The video should be a maximum of 3 minutes, filmed in landscape mode. Please name the video in the format: ‘Last Name First Name - Diplomat for a Day 2025 Entry’   use diplomatforadayluxembourg@gmail.com as recipient    or   email your essay to diplomatforadayluxembourg@gmail.com. This should be a maximum of 500 words   You must also fill in the Diplomat for a Day 2025 application form and send it to diplomatforadayluxembourg@gmail.com.  Your video or essay must be in English, as communication during Diplomat For a Day will be entirely in English.  Deadline  Make sure you enter the competition on time:  Competition opens: Monday 6 January 2025  Deadline for applications: Sunday 9 February 2025 at 23:59 CET  Competition winners contacted: 24 February 2025  Diplomat for Day activities: 6 March 2025  Apply for the competition by sending your completed  Diplomat for a Day application form  (ODT, 8.13 KB) and your video or essay by 23:59 CET, 9 February 2025.  You should also read the Diplomat For A Day 2025  terms and conditions  (ODT, 9.73 KB) before you enter. "
